title: Colour Changing Egg Timer - for Soft, Medium and Hard Boiled Eggs, Reusable Kitchen Tool, Boiled Egg Timer, Easy to Read and Use Cooking Timer
features: 🥚🍳 FOR BOILED EGG - Egg cups are perfect for boiled eggs soldiers. It holds the egg in place so you can dip your toast without scalding your hands on the hot egg or getting yolk everywhere. This boiled egg cup can hold and maintain the shape and size of any egg! A delightfully fun item and a great way to start the day

🥚🍳 CLASSIC & ELEGANT - Classic egg cups are designed with a wide base for stability and a lipped edge along the top, like a mini wine glass. Simple elegant design in multiple colours, this egg cup adds colour to your kitchen and breakfasts

🥚🍳 VARIOUS USAGE - Egg cups are not only used for boiled eggs, but there are also another few amazing alternative usages, such as a coffee cup, shot glass and candle holder, planter, dip holder, etc. Perfect for Daily Use & Special Occasions & Festival Decoration
🥚🍳 HIGH QUALITY - Made from durable plastic that's tasteless and non-toxic
🥚🍳 GREAT FOR GIFT - The style of egg cup is clean and simple, it is a perfect gift for your friends and family on housewarming, wedding or anniversary
